description.p: Sustain is a Linux-native music library and player heavily inspired by the dense, predictable workflow of iTunes circa 2012. It is built around a fast main table view, with first-class playlists, smart playlists, ratings, listening statistics, and search.

ul.li: Songs, Albums, and Playlists views with a keyboard-friendly table
Playlists, smart playlists, and playlist folders
Get Info metadata editor with tag mirroring to ID3, Vorbis, and MP4
5-star ratings, play count, skip count, last played, last skipped
Up Next queue with Play Next and Add to Queue
Real-time search with sortable and customizable columns
Remote artwork and metadata fetching via MusicBrainz, Cover Art Archive, and AcoustID
Native light and dark themes that follow the system accent color
Two library modes: leave files in place, or keep the library organized on disk

screenshot.caption: Main library view in the system dark theme
Main library view in the system light theme
